overall.summary: 台達電近期受惠於 AI 數據中心需求旺盛，股價屢創新高，儘管有成本上升警訊，整體面仍呈強勢上揚，後市有望持續受惠於雲端與 AI 基礎建設擴張。

details.title: DTE Energy Ties Data Center Growth To Renewables And Microgrid Plans
details.content_summary: Find your next quality investment with Simply Wall St's easy and powerful screener, trusted by over 7 million individual investors worldwide. \\ DTE Energy (NYSE:DTE) has signed a 1.4 GW power agreement to supply Oracle data centers, reinforcing its role in large scale digital infrastructure. \\ The company has received approvals tied to a 1 GW Google project, supporting additional clean power needs in Michigan. \\ DTE Energy has issued a request for proposals for 1 GW of new renewable capacity as part of its long term clean energy plan. \\ A new partnership with Delta Electronics focuses on a microgrid project that aims to improve reliability, ease grid pressure, and support net zero operations. \\ For investors watching regulated utilities, DTE Energy (NYSE:DTE) is stepping deeper into data center power demand and clean energy build out. The Oracle and Google related projects connect DTE directly to electricity needs from digital infrastructure, while the 1 GW renewable RFP links that demand to additional clean generation capacity in Michigan. \\ The Delta Electronics microgrid partnership gives DTE a real world test bed for advanced grid solutions that can support reliability and net zero objectives. For you as an investor, these moves may be useful to track as indicators of how DTE aligns its capital plans with long term electrification, corporate decarbonization goals, and potential new revenue sources tied to large power users. \\ Stay updated on the most important news stories for DTE Energy by adding it to your watchlist or portfolio. Alternatively, explore our Community to discover new perspectives on DTE Energy. \\ We've flagged 3 risks for DTE Energy. See which could impact your investment. \\ ⚖️ Price vs Analyst Target: At US$145.30, DTE trades about 8.5% below the US$158.89 consensus target, which sits within a fairly tight range of US$146 to US$168. \\ ⚖️ Simply Wall St Valuation: Shares are described as trading close to estimated fair value, with the stock around 3.2% below that assessment. \\ ❌ Recent Momentum: The stock has slipped about 1.1% over the last 30 days. \\ There is only one way to know the right time to buy, sell or hold DTE Energy. Head to Simply Wall St's company report for the latest analysis of DTE Energy's Fair Value. \\ 📊 The data center agreement, renewable tenders and microgrid project tie DTE more closely to large power users and clean energy spending, which you may want to factor into your long term thesis. \\ 📊 Watch how much capital DTE allocates to these projects, the impact on earnings relative to its 23.9x P/E and any updates to analyst targets around US$158.89. \\ ⚠️ Interest coverage is flagged as a major risk, so new investment linked to these projects makes DTE's debt servicing capacity an important metric to follow. \\ For the full picture including more risks and rewards, check out the complete DTE Energy analysis. Alternatively, you can visit the community page for DTE Energy to see how other investors believe this latest news will impact the company's narrative. \\ This article by Simply Wall St is general in nature. details.title: UBS nearly doubles Ceres Power target to 970p as data centre demand drives royalty surge
details.content_summary:
The content on this Site is provided for information purposes only and does not constitute investment advice, a personal recommendation, an offer or solicitation to buy or sell securities, or any other regulated activity. It should not be relied upon as the basis for any investment decision. \\ Before making any investment decision, you should: \\ Past performance is not a reliable indicator of future results. The value of investments can fall as well as rise. You may not recover the amount you invest, and in some cases you may be required to pay more. \\ Ian Lyall, a seasoned journalist and editor, brings over three decades of experience to his role as Managing Editor at Proactive. Overseeing Proactive's editorial and broadcast operations across six offices on three continents, Ian is responsible for quality control, editorial policy, and content production. He directs the creation of 50,000 pieces of real-time news, feature articles, and filmed interviews annually.

Prior to Proactive, Ian helped lead the business output at the Daily... Read more \\ Proactive financial news and online broadcast teams provide fast, accessible, informative and actionable business and finance news content to a global investment audience. All our content is produced independently by our experienced and qualified teams of news journalists. \\ Proactive news team spans the world’s key finance and investing hubs with bureaus and studios in London, New York, Toronto, Vancouver, Sydney and Perth. \\ We are experts in medium and small-cap markets, we also keep our community up to date with blue-chip companies, commodities and broader investment stories. This is content that excites and engages motivated private investors. \\ The team delivers news and unique insights across the market including but not confined to: biotech and pharma, mining and natural resources, battery metals, oil and gas, crypto and emerging digital and EV technologies. \\ Proactive has always been a forward looking and enthusiastic technology adopter. \\ Our human content creators are equipped with many decades of valuable expertise and experience. The team also has access to and use technologies to assist and enhance workflows. \\ Proactive will on occasion use automation and software tools, including generative AI. Nevertheless, all content published by Proactive is edited and authored by humans, in line with best practice in regard to content production and search engine optimisation. \\ Published: 06:30 22 May 2026 EDT \\ Shares in Ceres Power Holdings PLC (LSE:CWR, OTC:CPWHF), the clean energy technology group, jumped 17% to 779.3p on Friday after UBS raised its price target to 970p from 570p, citing a dramatic increase in expected royalty income from manufacturing partners. \\ The investment bank, which reiterated its buy rating, said it had increased its forecast for cumulative solid oxide fuel cell (SOFC) shipments by 60% to 1.8 gigawatts by 2030, delivering royalties of more than £100 million that year alone. \\ UBS said the upgrade was driven by channel checks with Ceres's manufacturing partners and the read-across from Bloom Energy's landmark 2.8 gigawatt order from Oracle, which demonstrated the scale of demand for fuel cell technology in powering data centres. \\ The broker now expects Delta Electronics, Ceres's Taiwanese licensee, to reach 900 megawatts of capacity by 2030, up from a previous estimate of 515 megawatts, while Weichai Power of China is forecast to hit one gigawatt. \\ UBS noted that if Delta were to secure an order of similar scale to Oracle's deal with Bloom, it could add roughly 7% to group revenue across 2027 to 2029. \\ The upgraded estimates lift group EBITDA forecasts by 31% in 2027 and 10% in 2028, with UBS now projecting positive free cash flow across 2026 to 2028. \\ The bank described 2026 as an inflexion year for EBITDA breakeven, with operating costs set to fall 20% year on year following a restructuring that has reduced annual cash burn to approximately £20 million. \\ UBS said it has increasing confidence that Ceres will secure a new licensing partner in 2026, noting that the company's pipeline of prospective partners has grown fivefold over the past year. \\ The US remains a gap in the licensing network, though Delta and Doosan can access the American market from their existing bases. \\ At its current share price, UBS calculates that the market is pricing in only around six gigawatts of cumulative SOFC shipments, which it called conservative against a total addressable market of 22 gigawatts per year by 2030 estimated by Ceres. \\ The bank's valuation puts Ceres at 10 times 2030 EV/EBITDA, a 44% discount to closest peer Bloom Energy on 18 times. \\ In its upside scenario of £12 per share, UBS models two new licence partners joining by 2027, higher royalties and stronger growth in data centre orders. \\ The downside case of 400p assumes no new partners, no royalty revenue in 2027 and a higher cost of capital. \\ UBS also values Ceres's green hydrogen electrolysis business at £2.60 per share, representing additional upside it says is not currently reflected in the share price.
details.reason: 新聞僅關於 Ceres Power 與 UBS 評等，未提及台達電。

details.title: Taiwan's Delta Electronics warns costs rising as AI data centre demand surges
details.content_summary: TAIPEI, April 30 (Reuters) - Delta Electronics, a major provider of power supply and ‌cooling solutions for AI datacentres, warned that it ‌expects costs to rise in the coming quarters, with oil prices ​rising and ongoing material shortages. \\ • It added that there were also signs of inflation driven by AI demand. \\ • The company said its capacity remained tight and ‌it was expanding in ⁠China, Thailand, the United States and Taiwan. \\ • It said in February its capital expenditure ⁠totalled T$46.1 billion ($1.46 billion) in 2025 and it reiterated on Thursday it would be higher this year. \\ • ​Delta Electronics' ​customers include Nvidia and ​major cloud service providers ‌such as Google and Meta Platforms. \\ • Delta Electronics is the second most valuable company on the Taiwan stock exchange, with a market capitalisation of $178.46 billion, after Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co Ltd. \\ • It reported first-quarter revenue ‌of T$159.35 billion ($5.02 billion), up ​34% from a year earlier, ​driven by AI data ​centre build-out. Its gross profit was up 56% ‌year-over-year at T$59 billion ($1.86 billion). \\ • ​Delta Electronics shares ​have risen 124.82% so far this year, far outperforming a 34.4% rise in the broader market. ​The company's ‌shares closed flat on Thursday ahead of its ​earnings release. \\ ($1 = 31.7170 Taiwan dollars) \\ (Reporting by Wen-Yee ​Lee. Editing by Mark Potter)
details.reason: 雖警告成本上升，但 AI 數據中心需求強勁，收入及毛利顯著成長。

details.title: 《台北股市》聯發科、台達電攻史上新高 台股首見四萬四！ - 富聯網
details.content_summary: 【時報-台北電】陣亡將士紀念日，美股休市一日。韓股今開高再創史上新高。台積電(2330)率AI電子權值股開高，台股早盤開高後一度漲逾400點，攻上44000點之上再締新猷。 \\ 美國宣揚重開荷姆茲海峽，美國原油和布蘭特原油雙雙下挫，提振市場氣氛。台積電開盤後上攻蓄勢挑戰新高，聯發科(2454)、台達電(2308)續創史高，以及高價電子股續攻，台股早盤最高漲453點至44097點，並首度攻上4萬4千點新高。不過，台積電拉回至平盤，台股指數漲點收斂。9時12分，台股漲72點至43717，台積電跌10元，聯電則續逆勢強攻新高。 \\ 美股因陣亡將士紀念日休市一天。中東和談進展並未中斷，據報美伊兩國有望於本周內達成為期60天的停火協議，並計畫在協議達成後第30日後將荷姆茲海峽恢復至戰前自由通行的狀態，國際油價回落幅度擴大。 \\ 國票投顧表示，台股指數近三日強漲逾三千點，若後續國際油價能隨和談進行持續走低，且對通膨敏感之長天期債券殖利率一同回落，台股應有望於Computex前夕持續攻高。 \\ 群益投顧指出，短線影響市場浮動的美伊談判，本質上是「事件」的推波，本波股市未因此「利空」事件而下跌，反屢創新高，以此可看出資金積極追逐股市、怕失去機會的追價心態濃烈。指數區間估41800點~44000點上下。（編輯：沈培華）
details.reason: 台達電股價創歷史新高，帶動台股突破 44000 點，顯示市場熱情高漲。

details.title: 台達電4天狂漲25%...今寫2410元新天價 專家看法出爐 - Yahoo股市
details.content_summary: 將 Yahoo 設為首選來源，在 Google 上查看更多我們的精彩報導 \\ 電源供應器龍頭廠台達電（2308）今日股價再度創下新高，早盤一度衝上2410元新天價，漲幅達5.2%，也讓台達電在短短4個交易日中股價漲幅來到25%。大來國際投顧分析師陳玠儒就表示，台達電今日創高拉回其實是受盤面氣氛影響，並非基本面出現疑慮，雖然短線上急漲不建議追入，但若拉回5日線量縮不破，並且再帶量向上，就會是一個不錯的進場獲利機會。 \\ 延伸閱讀：國巨「關禁閉」一度重挫8%...分析師曝一關鍵看多：看看聯發科 \\ 陳玠儒表示，台達電今日創高拉回其實是受到大盤漲多拉回的影響，畢竟台股指數4天大漲4000點，創高後就會受到市場賣壓的影響，也因此台達電也被波及。 \\ 不過陳玠儒也指出，台達電的基本面並沒有改變，僅是受到盤面氛圍的影響，若要介入的話建議短線急漲不要追，量縮拉回靠近5日均線時，不跌破且後續出量轉強，就有機會是另一次相對安全、有利可圖的買點。 \\ 整體來說，陳玠儒表示，因為台達電具有輝達的概念，也有低軌衛星的概念，在雙題材的加持下，在接下來台北國際電腦展以及SpaceX掛牌，都會有熱度在這邊，短線市場信心強，不用過度擔心。
details.reason: 短短四日股價漲逾 25%，創新天價，專家認為回測五日均線後仍有進場機會。

details.title: 聯發科跳空漲停！台達電噴8%、日月光漲6% 台股開高漲1170點再刷史高43438點 - Yahoo股市
details.content_summary: 將 Yahoo 設為首選來源，在 Google 上查看更多我們的精彩報導 \\ 由於美國公債殖利率走低，美股四大指數上周五全面收紅，道瓊漲294點、漲幅0.58%，費半更勁揚1.99%；不過AI晶片龍頭輝達（NVDA-US）挫跌1.90%、台積電ADR也下滑0.65%。而上周五收歷史新高的台股，今（25）日開高大漲399.9點至42667.87點，隨著台積電開盤大漲50元至2305元；聯發科跳空漲停，台達電漲8%、日月光投控漲6%，加權指數一度來到43438.13點，暴漲1170.16點。 \\ 五大電子權值股中，權王台積電（2330）開高漲20元至2275元，一度漲50元至2305元，漲幅2.22%；台達電（2308）開高大漲110元至2205元，一度漲185元至2280元，漲幅8.83%；聯發科（2454）開高至4245元跳空漲停；鴻海（2317）開高漲5元至255元，一度漲9.5元至259.5元，漲幅3.80%；日月光投控（3711）則以598元開出，上漲37元，一度漲38元至599元，漲幅6.77%。 \\ 更多FTNN新聞網報導斬獲台積電手握200億訂單！「半導體材料大廠」目標價喊480元 先進製程、晶圓擴廠引爆動能目標價喊1310元！「光阻領域大廠」卡位獨特供應鏈EPS上看22.91元 大客戶先進製程引爆動能聯發科噴漲215元、台達電漲3%！台積電開高15元 台股早盤漲559點守住41000關卡
details.reason: 台達電單日漲幅 8%，帶動台股再創史高，顯示資金積極追逐。

details.title: 焦點股》台達電：黃仁勳來台再掀AI旋風 帶量大漲 - 自由財經
details.content_summary:
隨著AI產品占比提升，台達電看好今年合併毛利率表現可望優於去年，有機會逐季增溫。（資料照） \\ 〔記者方韋傑／台北報導〕電源供應器大廠台達電（2308）全面卡位新一波AI基礎建設升級商機，受惠於終端大客戶輝達（NVIDIA）執行長黃仁勳來台參加台北國際電腦展（Computex），AI供應鏈持續受到買盤搶進，台達電今日股價跳空開高，截至上午9時13分暫報2260元，漲幅7.88%，成交量3187張。 \\ 台達電隨著AI伺服器電源架構走向模組化，強力布局電源機櫃與電池備援單元（BBU），未來隨整體架構普及，相關產品出貨可望同步放量。此外，±400V直流電產品預計今年開始量產出貨，800V直流電架構主要配合新一代AI平台，預計2027年起逐步放量。隨著AI產品占比提升，今年合併毛利率表現可望優於去年，有機會逐季增溫。 \\ 在新成長動能方面，台達電亦積極推進模組化資料中心解決方案，初期鎖定共置型機房業者，並已與中鼎工程合作導入智慧工程應用，未來將進一步拓展至企業客戶市場。另也持續投入固態氧化物燃料電池（SOFC）技術，產品最高效率可達85%，今年已交付樣品進行測試，預計2027年完成試產線建置並逐步導入量產，開拓AI資料中心能源供應新模式。 \\ 一手掌握經濟脈動
    點我訂閱自由財經Youtube頻道 \\ 不用抽 不用搶 現在用APP看新聞 保證天天中獎　
    點我下載APP　
    按我看活動辦法
details.reason: 黃仁勳來台帶動 AI 供應鏈熱度，台達電受惠於 AI 伺服器電源需求。

details.title: 股價緊逼台積電！台達電強漲近9%挑戰2300元大關 分析師曝「創高關鍵」 - Yahoo股市
details.content_summary: 將 Yahoo 設為首選來源，在 Google 上查看更多我們的精彩報導 \\ 台達電復活了！台股市值老三、電源供應器龍頭廠台達電（2308）今（25）日終於交出亮眼漲幅，早盤一度觸及2280元、漲幅達到8.8%。顧德投顧分析師張家豪受訪表示，若台達電本身可以站穩今日高點2280元，那後續幾天將有望去挑戰前波歷史高點2370元，今日操作上可以分批先進一半，若能站穩高點價，明日可順勢再加碼。 \\ 延伸閱讀：櫃買指數漲逾3%衝436點再創史上新高！分析師：別急著追高 \\ 台股市值第三大企業台達電經歷一波修整後，近日在台股氛圍逐步回溫後，今日終於再度回到2300元大關之前，有望對歷史高點2370元發起衝擊。 \\ 張家豪指出，台達電股價的確是漲得比較高，先前經歷一波壓回，以今日股價來看，早盤高點在2280元的位置，這是一個關鍵點位，若今日能順利收到這個價格以上，後續幾日就有望創高。 \\ 張家豪也建議，在操作上應該「先求有、再求好」，反倒可以利用零股來操作這種高價股，強勢行情之下，可以在今日伺機進場一批資金，若明日延續強勢走勢，則再順勢加碼，避免大量套牢也防止被行情軋空手。
details.reason: 股價逼近 2300 元大關，分析師看好突破歷史高點 2370 元的可能。

details.title: 台達電、奇鋐 挑逾100天 - 經濟日報
details.content_summary: 美商全球電子製造服務巨頭Flex最新財報優於預期。法人指出，由Flex第4季財報來看，AI基礎設施支出將持續增加，相關台廠則按讚台達電（2308）、奇鋐（3017）等給予「優於大盤」評等，相關權證可伺機操作。 \\ 法人表示，Flex計劃在2027年第1季前，將雲端與電源基礎設施（CPI）部門分拆為獨立上市公司，預計CPI部門2027會計年度營收將年增65%至75%，2028會計年度年增幅更可望突破80%。 \\ 法人分析，從此次Flex法說會中觀察，看好Flex於CPI業務的強勁成長前景，以及與超大規模雲端業者的合作進展，AI基礎設施的相關支出可望維持高檔，至少延續至2028至2029年，與近期亞洲電源與散熱供應鏈業者的看法一致，奇鋐可望成為受惠股之一。 \\ 為AI資料中心提供「端到端」電源與散熱解決方案，成亞洲供應鏈重要趨勢，如台達電與鴻海皆積極布局模組化資料中心解決方案。值得注意的是，外資大摩近期給予台達電目標價1,976元、奇鋐維持2,750元，均為「優於大盤」評等。 \\ 法人補充，Flex在電源供應器相關產品領域，為台達電與光寶科的競爭對手；在散熱產品方面，則與奇鋐、雙鴻等廠商互別苗頭。事實上，台達電今年第1季獲利表現亮眼，整體上是強勁的財報。展望後市，預期2026年至2027年獲利持續成長，兩年內獲利有望翻倍以上，市場近期也可望再掀起一波獲利預估上修潮。 \\ 權證發行商建議，看好台達電、奇鋐等相關權證後市表現的投資人，可挑相關認購權證進行布局。挑選標準，則以價內外10%以內、剩餘天數超過100天以上等條件為主，藉以放大槓桿利潤。 \\ ※ 歡迎用「轉貼」或「分享」的方式轉傳文章連結；未經授權，請勿複製轉貼文章內容
details.reason: Flex 展望顯示 AI 基礎設施支出持續成長，外資給予台達電目標價 1976 元，評等優於大盤。

details.title: 2308 台達電 - 指數43600的時候這裡2280 現在指數快44000了這邊...-股市爆料同學會 - CMoney
details.content_summary:
指數43600的時候這裡2280 現在指數快44000了這邊少30 又是哪來的廢物在那邊針對台積電和台達電
2250剛才那麼多張都被買完了這群賤畜又卡70張在那邊耶 要不要臉
如果像國巨或日月光那樣沒賤畜阻礙的漲 現在就是2500以上了
